event: surveillance blood cultures yielding Candida parapsilosis
admitted to the Cardiology Intermediate Unit
CT abdomen and pelvis showed large pericardial effusion
TTE showed mobile mass involving TV
large pericardial effusion (4.21 cm posterior, 3.73 cm anterior)
elevated intrapericardial pressure causing RV diastolic compression
blood cultures positive for C. parapsilosis
echodensity attached to tip suggestive of ruptured chordae
vegetation no longer visualized - suspicious for embolization
cefazolin and fluconazole switched to liposomal amphotericin B
removal of embolized CorMatrix TV from right PA
treated with 6 weeks Linezolid and Imipenem
